name: Sample Agent Profiles
description: Reusable sample agent profiles for AGenNext agent marketplace, OCI packaging, Zot registry publishing, and Podman or K3s runtime promotion.

agents.name: Fact Checker Crew
agents.role: Verifies claims across web sources and returns an evidence-backed confidence score.
agents.summary: A research, critique, and verdict workflow for validating market claims, policy statements, or research notes before publication.

agents.name: GitHub Issue Summarizer
agents.role: Reads repository issues and turns noisy threads into triage-ready engineering briefs.
agents.summary: A maintainer assistant that groups issue themes, extracts reproduction details, and recommends next actions for product and engineering teams.

agents.name: Marketing Strategy Agent
agents.role: Builds campaign positioning, audience angles, and launch content plans from a product brief.
agents.summary: A strategy crew for early go-to-market work: researcher, strategist, copy lead, and reviewer coordinated into one repeatable run.

agents.name: SQL Data Agent
agents.role: Answers operational questions by inspecting schema, generating SQL, and explaining results.
agents.summary: A stateful data agent for internal analytics where query planning, execution, and explanation need clear checkpoints.

agents.name: Travel Planner Team
agents.role: Coordinates destination research, weather, maps, lodging, and itinerary tradeoffs.
agents.summary: A multi-tool planning team for comparing routes, constraints, activities, and stay options across a trip brief.

agents.name: Local Remote Collaborator
agents.role: Splits work between private local models and stronger remote models for cost-aware execution.
agents.summary: A collaboration pattern for sensitive or long-context work where cheap local processing and remote reasoning are orchestrated together.

runtimeArtifacts.ociStack:
services:
  zot-registry:
    image: ghcr.io/project-zot/zot-linux-amd64:latest
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    volumes:
      - zot-data:/var/lib/registry

  agent-api:
    image: localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      AGENT_PROFILE: fact-checker
      MODEL_PROVIDER: oci-model-runner
      MCP_GATEWAY_URL: http://mcp-gateway:9000

  model-runner:
    image: localhost:5000/agennext/model-runner:slim
    volumes:
      - model-cache:/models

  mcp-gateway:
    image: localhost:5000/agennext/mcp-gateway:slim
    environment:
      ENABLED_TOOLS: duckduckgo,github,postgres,weather

  worker:
    image: localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-worker:slim
    depends_on:
      - agent-api
      - model-runner
      - mcp-gateway

volumes:
  zot-data:
  model-cache:
runtimeArtifacts.podmanCommands:
podman network create agennext-agents
podman run -d --name zot-registry --network agennext-agents -p 5000:5000 \
  -v zot-data:/var/lib/registry ghcr.io/project-zot/zot-linux-amd64:latest
podman pull ghcr.io/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
podman tag ghcr.io/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
podman push localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
podman kube play oci-stack.yaml
runtimeArtifacts.k3sCommands:
k3s kubectl create namespace agennext-agents
k3s kubectl apply -n agennext-agents -f zot-registry.yaml
podman pull ghcr.io/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
podman tag ghcr.io/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
podman push localhost:5000/agennext/sample-agent-api:slim
k3s kubectl apply -n agennext-agents -f agent-stack.yaml
k3s kubectl rollout status deployment/agent-api -n agennext-agents
